named-query.name: UserWeblogStar.getByUserAndWeblog
named-query.query: SELECT s FROM UserWeblogStar s WHERE s.user = ?1 AND s.weblog = ?2

named-query.name: UserWeblogStar.getStarredWeblogsByUser
named-query.query: SELECT s FROM UserWeblogStar s WHERE s.user = ?1 ORDER BY s.weblog.lastModified DESC

named-query.name: UserWeblogStar.getTrendingWeblogs
named-query.query: SELECT s.weblog.id, COUNT(s) FROM UserWeblogStar s GROUP BY s.weblog.id ORDER BY COUNT(s) DESC

named-query.name: UserWeblogStar.getCountByWeblog
named-query.query: SELECT COUNT(s) FROM UserWeblogStar s WHERE s.weblog = ?1

named-query.name: UserWeblogStar.removeByWeblog
named-query.query: DELETE FROM UserWeblogStar s WHERE s.weblog = ?1

named-query.name: UserWeblogStar.removeByUser
named-query.query: DELETE FROM UserWeblogStar s WHERE s.user = ?1
